titleStmt.title: SII 25.69: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 69. (A.R. No. 69 of 1908.) VEḌĀL, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in the Nīlakaṇṭhēśvara temple.
The regnal year and the other details of date viz., Kaṟkaṭaka śu 7, Wednesday correspond to 1318 A.D., July 5.

It records tax-free gift of the village Naṅgaiyār-ēndal by the nāṭṭār of Perumugaip-paṟṟu in Malaippaṟṟu for conducting worship in, and the repairs of, the temple of god Kaṟaikaṇṭhīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Viḍāl in Vikramapāṇḍya-vaḷanāḍu alias Viḍārpaṟṟu of Veṇkuṉṟak-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koṉerimel koṇṭāṉ koṟcaṭapaṉmar tirupuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī cuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉmuṉṟāvatiṉ Etir muṉṟāvatu kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu saptamiyum putaṉkiḻamai peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu veṇkuṉṟakko
ṭṭattu viṭāṟpaṟṟāḷa vikkirama pāṇṭiya vaḷanāṭṭu viṭāl Uṭaiyār kaṟaikkaṇṭīcuramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku malaippaṟṟil perumukaippaṟṟu nāṭṭavarom Iṉṉāyaṉārkku pūcaikkun tiruppaṇikkum Eṅkaḷ nāṭṭil naṅkaiyār Ēntal tirunāmattukkāṇi yiṟaiyiliyākat tantom Ivūr nāṟpāṟkellaikkum
naṭuvupaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey māvaṭai kuḷavaṭai puṟavaṭai Erivāypuṟavaṭai nattantaricu kaḷartiṭar taṟiyiṟai kācāy vaṟkam maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭaṉavum tirunāmattukkāṇi yiṟaiyiliyākattantu Ivūr candrātitta varaiyuñ celvatāka kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭi Ivūr nāṉ
kellaiyilun tiruccūla stāpaṉamum paṇṇittantom perumukaippaṟṟu nāṭṭavarom Ippaṭikku nāṭṭavar paṇiyāl Ivai nāṭṭuk kaṇakku vicaiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 25.69 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
